Briefly describe the change and the motivation.

## Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Infrastructure / CloudFormation

## How it was tested
Commands run, stacks deployed, or manual checks. Note the region.

## Checklist
- [ ] `cfn-lint stacks/*.yaml` passes (no errors)
- [ ] No secrets, account IDs, real IPs, or personal data committed
- [ ] `README.md` / `ARCHITECTURE.md` updated if behaviour or structure changed
- [ ] For SearchCourses code changes: new version published and `live` alias repointed
